creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Security update to 3.0.1.1

Fixes a XSS problem in a designer component.

The Announce message:

    Welcome to phpMyAdmin versions 2.11.9.3 and 3.0.1.1 which fix a security
    problem (details will follow on phpmyadmin.net).

    Details / downloads: http://phpmyadmin.net.

    Marc Delisle, for the team

ChangeLog:

   http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/downloads.php?relnotes=0
   http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=637083
